title: Tender Peruvian Potatoes Bake
description: Fermented, velvety, and nostalgic Peruvian dish featuring extra clotted cream and infused oil. Serve warm on a lazy Susan spinner.

ingredients.name: chili flakes
ingredients.notes: Red pepper flakes or Peruvian aji amarillo powder

ingredients.name: garlic
ingredients.notes: Mince or crush garlic to release flavors

ingredients.name: olive oil
ingredients.notes: Infused with Peruvian herbs or spices

ingredients.name: salt
ingredients.notes: Flaky sea salt or kosher salt

instructions: Pierce the potatoes 3-4 times with a fork to allow steam to escape.
Bake the potatoes for 45 minutes or until they are tender.
While the potatoes are baking, mix the clotted cream, chili flakes, garlic, cumin, coriander, and salt in a bowl.
Once the potatoes are done, let them cool for 5-10 minutes.
Slice the potatoes in half lengthwise and scoop out some of the flesh to make room for the cream mixture.
Fill each potato shell with the clotted cream mixture and drizzle with infused oil.
Return the potatoes to the oven for an additional 10-15 minutes or until the filling is heated through.
Serve the potatoes warm on a lazy Susan spinner.
